description:
Super Mario Bros. Wonder integration for Archipelago.  Course-clear,
Top-of-Flag, Wonder Seed, and Palace events are detected automatically
via a Switch subsdk that streams events over LAN; the bridge here
relays them as Archipelago location checks and pushes received items
(badges, Royal Seeds) back to the live save.

v0.1.0-alpha.description:
## SMBW Archipelago v0.1.0-alpha

### First-time users — start here

**[docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/blob/v0.1.0-alpha/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMBW Client setup wizard.

### Verifying the download

```
sha256sum -c smbwonder.apworld.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* M3.3: container-A counter grant wired end-to-end + Royal Seed plumbin… by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/1
* M3.3b: Royal Seed bool grant live end-to-end by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/2
* M4 follow-up #2: AP-authoritative badge sync (SetBadgesAbsolute) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/3
* M4.5: Royal Seed replay-on-HelloMsg by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/4
* M3.8 DeathLink — bridge plumbing + switch-mod bump by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/5
* switch-mod: bump to b0c274c (wondar#3 smoke-test cleanup) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/7
* M2.2: 10-coin AP-check routing via PlayReport diff by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/6
* Rewrite AP/bridge as Kivy SMBW Client launchable via Archipelago by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/8
* M2.3 badge check detection + 24/24 internal_id mapping complete by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/9
* M3.7 game-completion hook + Kivy port fixes (DeathLink/Royal Seed/shutdown) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/10
* switch-mod: bump to 3682705 (wondar#5 M2.3 badge detection, post-rebase) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/11
* M4 location_table: STAGEKEY diagnostic log + investigation record by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/12
* Top-of-flag clears also emit Normal Exit check by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/14
* 10 Coin: grant +10 purple coins on receive, refund -10 on local pickup by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/15
* Re-port PR #13: 142-course location_table to master by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/16
* 10 Coin: gate TEN_COIN refund on ten_coin_sanity slot_data option by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/19
* M3.4 Wonder Seed gate-check RE scaffold: three-phase static-analysis strategy by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/20
* options: precollect Power-Ups/Characters, add DeathLink, hide M3.5/M3.6 toggles by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/17
* M3.7: respect the goal option (gate Bowser hook, signal on goal-location check) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/18
* M3.3 Wonder Seed: AP-authoritative per-world gate override (bridge side) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/21
* Add /setup wizard (probe -> install -> junction -> build -> deploy) + .smbwap file association by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/22
* Update game display name to 'Super Mario Bros Wonder' by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/23
* switch-mod: bump to 9f35a09 (WS gate override interceptor) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/24
* Fix: pause-menu quit misrouted to NORMAL_EXIT (+ worktree-aware installer) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/25
* gui: collapse SMBW Status + SMBW + All into one split SMBW tab by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/26
* Inline switch-mod (wondar fork) into outer repo by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/29
* ci: run pytest on PRs to master by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/27
* docs: correct WS world_val -> bucket mapping (Petal Isles at 2) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/30
* ci: pin pytest to Python 3.11 instead of matrix by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/31
* lan_server: coalesce per-hash IncrementHashKeyed deltas before send by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/32
* ci: add dependabot config for github-actions by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/33
* Route hub-house AP check off exit event (replay-after-disconnect) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/34
* ci: Bump actions/checkout from 4.3.1 to 6.0.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/36
* ci: Bump actions/setup-python from 5.6.0 to 6.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/35
* royal_seeds: AP-authoritative absolute-overwrite sync by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/37
* switch-mod: shadow dirty value in incrementContainerACounter to fix +10 coin clobber by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/39
* wonder seed: live refresh via push on SetWonderSeedCounts drain by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/38
* switch-mod: gate WS override + drainInbound during scene transitions by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/40
* Poplin Shop wonder-seed AP checks via general_shop_result PlayReport by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/41
* switch-mod: substitute Wonder Seed counts at container-A reader by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/42
* processor: emit BADGE_ACQUIRED on shop buys and badge-granting course clears by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/43
* Add tag-triggered release pipeline by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/44
* Align apworld logic with community PDF: KO clears, secret flagpoles, region-gate fixes by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/45

## New Contributors
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/36

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/commits/v0.1.0-alpha
v0.1.0-alpha.title: v0.1.0-alpha

v0.2.12-beta.description:
## SMBW Archipelago v0.2.12-beta

### First-time users — start here

**[docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/blob/v0.2.12-beta/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMBW Client setup wizard.

### Verifying the download

```
sha256sum -c smbwonder.apworld.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* setup wizard: relax cmake floor to 3.16 and distinguish too-old from missing by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/83
* setup wizard: invert Python PATH probe order so PATH wins over 3.11 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/84
* apworld: remove generate_output (stops false patch file on archipelago.gg) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/85
* bridge: auto-resolve badge location on AP grant (fixes shop soft-lock) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/87
* logic: drop KO Arena "Normal Exit" checks (arenas have no flagpole) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/88
* bridge: send palace 10-coin checks + log non-death scene states by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/89
* logic: gate Petal Isles sub-regions on W2/W3 Royal Seeds by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/91
* setup wizard: detect Git off PATH and pass winget already-installed exit by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/90
* Wonder Seed per-world count persistence (container-D writer + RE) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/92
* deathlink: fix inconsistent inbound/outbound deaths (stale base + sticky guard) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/86


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/compare/v0.2.11-beta...v0.2.12-beta
v0.2.12-beta.title: v0.2.12-beta

## SMBW Archipelago v0.2.5-beta

### First-time users — start here

**[docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/blob/v0.2.5-beta/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMBW Client setup wizard.

```
sha256sum -c smbwonder.apworld.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* wizard: disable Close button while setup is running by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/51
* SMBW tab: per-world seed table + human-readable badge list by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/52
* M-Hakkun Phase 1: skeleton swap (no hooks) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/54
* M-Hakkun Phase 2a: port 3 CORE_INIT hooks + wire SD-log drain by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/56
* Claude/hakkun migration phase 2g by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/63
* Claude/hakkun migration phase 1 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/64
* ApFrameBridge: coalesce duplicate absolute-overwrite messages on drain by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/65
* logic: remove all badge item requirements from level/region gates by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/66
* bridge: route Break Time! course clears to WONDER_SEED check by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/67
* setup wizard: cut over from exlaunch to hakkun toolchain by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/68
* switch-mod: dirty-queue depth observability + writer backpressure by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/69


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/compare/v0.2.4-beta...v0.2.5-beta

v0.3.0-beta.description:
## SMBW Archipelago v0.3.0-beta

### First-time users — start here

**[docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/blob/v0.3.0-beta/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMBW Client setup wizard.

### Verifying the download

```
sha256sum -c smbwonder.apworld.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* docs: fix first-time setup flow — click SMBW Client button then /setup by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/100
* imgui-overlay: render the on-Switch debug overlay via LibHakkun ImGuiBackendNvn by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/101
* imgui-overlay: gate NVN present-draw until safe (fix intermittent boot crash) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/102
* Implement level-entry death-gate for badge & Bowser courses by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/103
* Show on-Switch imgui countdown before level-entry death-gate kill by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/104
* imgui-overlay: fix present-thread crash from stale borrowed command buffer; make overlay mandatory by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/105
* fix: route KO Arena Wonder Seeds via course_result (issue 2) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/106
* fix: send Royal Seed check on palace clear via course_result (issue 4) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/107
* logic: drop Royal Seed gates from Petal Isles sub-regions (issues 1 & 3) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/108

* logic: rename the 5 World-Bowser courses PI: -> BC: by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/124
* fix: pin open-world active worlds from slot_data for Universal Tracker by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/126

v0.6.0.description:
## SMBW Archipelago v0.6.0

### First-time users — start here

**[docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/blob/v0.6.0/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMBW Client setup wizard.

### Verifying the download

```
sha256sum -c smbwonder.apworld.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* gate-kill: widen the entry grace window 10s -> 30s by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/127
* open-world: Bowser approach (cloud piranhas + castle fly-in) on the category-routed unlock channel by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/129
* docs: offline RomFS GameData datamining skill + RE-doc updates by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/130
* open-world: goal is beating Bowser, with the whole Castle gated like the final level by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/135
* Power-up negation: deny-mask hook on the native ItemGet can-get bitmask by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/138
* open-world: surface Petal Isles courses + shops + level-clear roads (reload-safe) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/139
* logic: drop the badge requirement to ENTER Badge Challenge courses by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/137
* badges: force-unequip AP-disabled badges (fix auto-equip showing disabled badge as available) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/134
* open-world: draw Petal Isles intra-world course-connecting roads by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/131
* open-world: make W1 fast-travelable to 1-1 when active by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/133
* client: badge entry-gate-kill toggle, default OFF (/badge_gate_kills on) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/136


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/compare/v0.5.3...v0.6.0
v0.6.0.title: v0.6.0

v0.9.0.description:
## SMBW Archipelago v0.9.0

### First-time users — start here

**[docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/blob/v0.9.0/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMBW Client setup wizard.

### Verifying the download

```
sha256sum -c smbwonder.apworld.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* fix(logic): drop Elephant Fruit gate on W6 Hot-Hot Hot! 10 Coin #2 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/160
* Character-block sanity: precise hit detection (BlockUpMove hook) + AP character-unlock gate by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/161
* fix(char-blocks): correct PlayerCharaType enum order for indices 7-11 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/163
* Character-selection gate: force locked selections to a random AP-unlocked character by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/162
* ci: bump softprops/action-gh-release from 3.0.1 to 3.0.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/165
* Character shuffle: 1-of-7 start + Character-Block logic gating & live resolution by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/166
* Course logic fixes: badge/Yoshi gates, All-Power-Up badges, Piranha Plant Reprise by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/167
* Remove button_shuffle entirely (items, category, option, logic) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/168
* logic: merge community logic review — power-up/badge tie, drop deferred shuffle items, Jewel-Block Cave fix by @SylvieSpark in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/164


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/compare/v0.8.4...v0.9.0
v0.9.0.title: v0.9.0
